rewritten_requirements: The system shall calculate the budget balance by summing advert costs, adding an overheads percentage, and subtracting from the planned budget.
The system shall display a list of clients in the Client dropdown when a client is selected.
The system shall enable the Campaign dropdown with a list of campaigns after a client has been selected.
The system shall enable the Check button when a campaign is selected.
The system shall display the result of the budget calculation in the Budget textfield.
The system shall perform a budget balance calculation when the Check button is clicked.
The system shall clear the Budget textfield when a new client or campaign is selected.
The system shall disable the Check button when a new client is selected.
The system shall display an alert dialogue with the message ‘Close window? Are you sure?’ and OK/Cancel buttons when the Close button is clicked.
The system shall exit the use case when the OK button is clicked in the alert dialogue.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Calculate budget balance by summing advert costs, adding overheads percentage, and subtracting from planned budget.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: This is calculated by summing the cost of all the adverts in a campaign, adding a percentage for overheads and subtracting the result from the planned budget.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Display client list in Client dropdown when user selects a client.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The Client dropdown displays a list of clients. When a client is selected, their campaigns will be displayed in the Campaign dropdown.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Enable Campaign dropdown with campaign list after client selection.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: When a client is selected, a list of campaigns is loaded into the Campaign dropdown.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Enable Check button when user selects a campaign.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The Campaign dropdown displays a list of campaigns belonging to the client selected in the Client dropdown. When a campaign is selected the Check button is enabled.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Display budget calculation result in Budget textfield.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The Budget textfield displays the result of the calculation to check the budget.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Perform budget balance calculation when user clicks Check button.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The Check button causes the calculation of the budget balance to take place.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Clear Budget textfield when user selects a new client or campaign.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: It is cleared whenever a new client is selected or a new campaign is selected. It is not editable.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Disable Check button when user selects a new client.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The Check button is disabled whenever a new client is selected.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Display alert dialogue with 'Close window? Are you sure?' message and OK/Cancel buttons when user clicks Close button.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: When the Close button is clicked, an alert dialogue is displayed. This asks ‘Close window? Are you sure?’ and displays two buttons labelled OK and Cancel.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Exit use case when user clicks OK in alert dialogue.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If OK is clicked the window is exited; if Cancel is clicked then it carries on in the state it was in before the close button was clicked.
